title: T-019 — Replication retry / Run Sync modal + bulk job enqueue (MS-106) §10B, V-MS-22
prompt:
# T-019 — Replication retry / Run Sync modal + bulk job enqueue

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10B MS-106, §11.6 V-MS-22
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:241-270 (replication_retry_modal)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §M-04

## Goal
Implement the MS-106 modal so admins can trigger bulk replication retry / full sync from MS-MDS or MS-REP pages. Server Action enqueues jobs to replication_jobs (T-017).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/_components/replication-retry-modal.tsx — shadcn Dialog + scope-driven label/description (failed / all / single) + priority RadioGroup (normal/high).
2. Server Action retryReplicationJobs({scope, jobId?, priority, entityTypes?}):
   - V-MS-22: assert role='admin' else throw UnauthorizedReplicationAction.
   - V-MS-22: assert at least one entity selected (entityTypes.length >= 1 for scope='failed'/'all'); for scope='single', jobId required.
   - Insert N rows into replication_jobs with status='pending', priority mapped to integer (normal=5, high=1), scheduled_at=now().
   - Returns inserted job IDs for optimistic UI.
3. Optimistic-UI: queue row pulses amber in replication queue table via mutation key 'replication-queue' (react-query).
4. Tests: V-MS-22 admin check + zero-entity rejection + jobs enqueued with correct status/priority + scope=single requires jobId.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/_components/replication-retry-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/_actions/retry-replication-jobs.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/_components/__tests__/replication-retry-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/_actions/__tests__/retry-replication-jobs.test.ts [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given modal opens with scope='failed', when compared to modals.jsx:241-270 (replication_retry_modal), then label says 'Retry All Failed', priority RadioGroup present, target sites list visible — RTL parity.
2. Given user role != admin, when Server Action runs, then UnauthorizedReplicationAction thrown (V-MS-22).
3. Given scope='all' and entityTypes=[], when Server Action runs, then NoEntitiesSelected thrown (V-MS-22 at-least-one).
4. Given scope='single' without jobId, when Server Action runs, then ScopeSingleRequiresJobId thrown.
5. Given valid admin call scope='failed', priority='high', entityTypes=['items','boms'], when settled, then 2 rows inserted in replication_jobs with status='pending' priority=1 scheduled_at=now().
6. Given the modal submits successfully, when the queue table re-renders, then the new jobs appear with amber-pulse styling via mutation invalidation.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + V-MS-22 admin check + zero-entity rejection + scope=single jobId requirement + correct DB inserts before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run replication-retry-modal' + Playwright replication-retry.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:241-270 (replication_retry_modal).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-admin to trigger retry (V-MS-22 must be enforced server-side; UI hide alone is insufficient).
- Do not enqueue zero rows on empty entity list — explicit error.
- Do not let scope='single' silently succeed without jobId — fail-closed.
- Do not bypass replication_jobs RLS — every insert must include org_id from withOrgContext.
- Do not log entityTypes payload at info if it contains commercially sensitive data — redact via T-117 if needed.
